visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Animation style. The scene opens in a classroom with two male characters, one bald and one with black hair, sitting at desks. The background shows a chalkboard and classroom windows with soft daylight. (2) The bald character appears bored, then brightens up and begins writing on a small piece of paper with a blue pen. The camera zooms in on his focused expression. (3) He passes the folded paper to the black-haired character next to him. The character looks surprised and opens it. (4) Sudden transition to a dramatic close-up of the bald character with speed lines in the background. He is shouting with a wide-open mouth and wide eyes. (5) Back in the classroom, the bald character is shown shivering, hugging himself. A small bubble icon appears next to his head showing him as a cold character. (6) The black-haired character reaches into a red backpack and pulls something out. (7) A third character, a teacher with glasses, is seen at the front of the room holding a green textbook labeled 'National Defense'. (8) The two main characters are shown looking very somber and serious with sweat drops and dark lines over their faces. (9) A final screen displays two scorecards with character names and scores (98 and 96). (10) The bald character is shown in a small inset circle at the bottom right, smiling and waving.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Subtitle]: 於是我們就開始一起上課. (2) [Subtitle]: 好無聊喔. (3) [Subtitle]: 不然來傳紙條好了. (4) [Subtitle]: 先來問學長等等午餐想吃什麼. (5) [Subtitle]: 等等午餐你想吃啥 肚子餓 XD. (6) [Subtitle]: 欸學長. (7) [Subtitle]: 等等吃學餐吧. (8) [Variety]: 啪!. (9) [Subtitle]: 不行! 你破壞了上課傳紙條的規則!. (10) [Subtitle]: 什麼規則?. (11) [Subtitle]: 傳紙條過去就要用寫的回來. (12) [Subtitle]: 有這種規則嗎?. (13) [Subtitle]: 喔. (14) [Subtitle]: 好像對了又好像不對. (15) [Subtitle]: 怎麼還沒下課啊. (16) [Subtitle]: 話說這冷氣是不是開太強了, 好冷喔. (17) [Subtitle]: 欸學長. (18) [Subtitle]: 好像有點冷耶. (19) [Subtitle]: 他要拿外套嗎? 太棒了. (20) [Subtitle]: 拿出你的外套讓我蓋蓋吧. (21) [Subtitle]: 給你. (22) [Subtitle]: ?. (23) [Subtitle]: 戰爭真的很可怕. (24) [Subtitle]: 所以全民國防現在是所有人的課題. (25) [Subtitle]: 欸學長怎麼感覺心情又變差了. (26) [Subtitle]: 學長你在想什麼呀. (27) [Subtitle]: 你怎麼好像心情不好. (28) [Subtitle]: 唉. (29) [Subtitle]: 完了 是不是我一直煩他他不爽了. (30) [Subtitle]: 欸對不起啦 我不會再吵你. (31) [Subtitle]: 那些被戰爭迫害的人民真可憐. (32) [Variety]: 超認真聽課. (33) [Subtitle]: 於是 教室小悸動企劃 大失敗. (34) [Subtitle]: 沒事 還有一個學期呢. (35) [Subtitle]: 教室的小悸動計畫 還在繼續. (36) [Subtitle]: 結果我們後來都超認真上課. (37) [Subtitle]: 什麼教室青春物語 一個都沒有實現. (38) [Subtitle]: 而且因為太認真. (39) [Subtitle]: 我們兩個國防課報告分數 還高達98分跟96分. (40) [Subtitle]: 全民國防 你我有責.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main students and 1 teacher in the classroom.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald character (A Chu) and a black-haired male character (Senior), both in casual shirts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple animated classroom with desks, a chalkboard, and windows showing a blue sky.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Narrative voice starts with a lighthearted tone over bouncy electronic BGM. (2) Squeaky writing sound effect follows by a paper sliding sound. (3) A popping SFX occurs when a text bubble appears. (4) Loud, sharp impact 'Slap' sound effect marks a sudden shift to high-volume shouting. (5) Shivering teeth-chattering vocal sounds are heard. (6) A zip sound and fabric rustle occur. (7) Background music changes to a slightly more serious, low-key piano melody as the teacher's voice speaks in a calm, professional tone. (8) Sighing and low-pitched mumbles represent characters being serious. (9) Digital 'ding' or chime sound effect at the score reveal.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: An animated comedy sketch depicting the humorous misunderstandings and student interactions during a national defense class, emphasizing the contrast between social intent and academic results.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No brands are explicitly promoted; it is character-driven narrative content.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and exaggerated sound effects common in social media animation shorts.
